exact_lines_changed.description: Inserted check_entry_gates() call between Signal() construction (line 503) and open_position() call (now line 526). Added open_per_market build loop, gate call, rejection branch with logging and guard tracking, and pass-through to open_position().

summary_of_fix: The bridge entry path in bot_core.py previously went: get_approved_intents() -> Signal() -> open_position() with no risk gate call. The patch inserts check_entry_gates() between Signal construction and open_position(). On rejection: logs 'BRIDGE GATE REJECT [check_entry_gates]' with slug and reasons, increments _guard_block_count, appends to loop_guard_reasons, and skips the entry. On pass: proceeds to open_position() as before. All MIN_ENTRY_CONFIDENCE, MAX_TOTAL_COMMITTED_USD, spread, depth, imbalance, concurrent, and per-market gates now apply to bridge entries.
patched_call_order: 1. get_approved_intents(open_slugs) — model_bridge internal pre-flight (rec_age, slug dedup)
4. Signal() construction with confidence from intent
6. [NEW] check_entry_gates(ob, signal, mode_ctx, len(current_open), _bridge_open_per_market, market.market_id, _time_to_end(market), market=market, market_cooldown=_market_cooldown)
7. [NEW] if not _gate_ok: log BRIDGE GATE REJECT [check_entry_gates], increment guard count, continue
8. open_position() — only reached if gate passes

variables_in_scope_at_insertion_point.mode_ctx: set at top of main loop iteration (update_mode)
variables_in_scope_at_insertion_point.current_open: fetch_open_trades() called at start of each bridge intent iteration
variables_in_scope_at_insertion_point._market_cooldown: module-level dict, in scope throughout main()
variables_in_scope_at_insertion_point.loop_guard_reasons: list[str] declared at start of each main loop iteration
variables_in_scope_at_insertion_point._guard_block_count: module-level int, in scope throughout main()

verification_performed.py_compile_result: PASS — python -m py_compile bot_core.py returned exit 0

acceptance_criteria.rejection_reasons_logged_clearly: PASS — BRIDGE GATE REJECT [check_entry_gates] slug=... reasons=...

restart_reason: bot_core.py is a running process (PID from prior session). The patch is a source file change only. The live process must be restarted to pick up the new check_entry_gates() call. Until restart, bridge entries continue to bypass the gate.
